question: What is the setup process like?
answer: Getting started is easy! Once you sign up, you can connect your existing tools in minutes using our intuitive setup wizard and pre-built integrations.

question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan at any time?
answer: Yes, you can change your plan at any time from your dashboard. Changes are applied immediately and reflected in your next billing cycle.

question: Is my data secure on your platform?
answer: Security is our top priority. We use bank-grade encryption, regular security audits, and comply with major standards like SOC2 and GDPR to ensure your data is always protected.

question: Do you offer discounts for non-profits?
answer: Yes, we love supporting organizations that do good! Contact our sales team with proof of your non-profit status to receive a special 50% discount on all annual plans.

question: What kind of support can I expect?
answer: All plans include access to our community forums and help center. Professional and Enterprise plans include 24/7 priority email and chat support.
